cn.releaseNotes:
- Performance improvements and minor enhancements
- Bug fixes for a smoother experience
cn.description:
MagicKit AI – 全能设备与实用工具包

MagicKit AI 是一款完整的实用工具应用，旨在帮助您监控设备状态、优化性能，并从一个便捷界面访问日常工具。专为 iOS 打造，MagicKit AI 集合了多种核心功能，同时保护您的隐私并节省电池。

设备与系统工具：
• 电池状态：查看当前电量和充电状态
• 存储使用情况：分析可用与已用空间
• 设备信息：查看基本硬件与系统详情
• 运行时间监控：了解设备持续运行时间
• 电池使用建议：获取实用省电技巧
• 照片清理：检测并删除重复或相似照片以释放空间

网络工具：
• 网速测试：测量您的互联网连接速度
• Wi-Fi 信息：查看网络名称、IP 地址和连接状态
• IP 查询：查看公网 IP 的地理位置

实用工具：
• 单位换算器：支持多种单位互转
• 货币转换器：实时汇率与换算
• 日期时间计算器：支持工作日差值计算
• 时区转换器：全球时间转换，含夏令时支持
• 倒计时与提醒：创建美观倒计时，可自定义提醒与重复事件
• Magic 计数器：多项目统计追踪，含连续天数与数据统计
• 二维码扫描：快速识别二维码
• 文档扫描：高质量扫描保存文档
• 指南针与水平仪：使用设备传感器测量方向与水平
• 屏幕方向锁定：在应用内锁定屏幕方向
• 音频检测仪：通过麦克风测量环境音量
• 剪贴板管理器：访问并管理当前会话复制内容
• 手电筒：开启设备手电筒
• 亮度调节：直接在应用内调整屏幕亮度

功能亮点：
• 简洁易用的向导式界面
• 无广告，无内购
• 轻量节能
• 兼容所有 iOS 设备
• 工具持续更新添加
• 注重隐私与性能设计

适用人群：
• 设备状态监控与性能优化
• 日常换算与测量任务
• 文档与二维码扫描
• 照片清理释放空间
• 倒计时提醒管理
• 习惯追踪与进度统计
• 快速工具访问（如手电筒、亮度）
• 简易网络诊断

立即下载 MagicKit AI，用一个智能强大的工具包简化您的日常任务！

You will be able to explore your eating habits visually and improve your eating habits. No calories and no numbers are shown in the app! 

Features:
+ Beautifully minimalist food diary app
+ In-App Camera And Filter
+ No calories No Pressure
+ Visualizes all your diets and shows your diet balance clearly!
+ Crazy and Interactive Foody Face
+ Learn how to eat mindfully and correctly right now!

Don’t make Foody Face angry! Tap download right now!

----------

The inspiration behind FoodyLife is that nowadays people pay little attention to what they eat and often eat unhealthy food. Although there are many similar apps on the market (e.g. Fitness App, Calorie counter...), most of them focus mainly on “numbers”, such as how many calories the user has eaten and how long the user should exercise to get rid of those calories, or sending the user notifications when they should get up to exercise or if they have eaten too much.

FoodyLife’ is an app that helps users track their daily diet by allowing them to keep their own food diary. The app shows neither calories nor numbers; instead, users have only to take a picture, enter their diet information, then they are able their overall diet balance. It is very simple and highly effective. Users can explore their eating habits visually, improving self-consciousness about eating habits.

hk.description:
MagicKit AI – 全方位裝置與工具箱

MagicKit AI 是一款完整的實用工具應用程式，專為 iOS 設計，幫助您監控裝置狀態、優化效能，並透過單一介面輕鬆使用日常工具。功能齊全，兼顧隱私與電池續航。

裝置與系統工具：
• 電池狀態：查看目前電量與充電情況
• 儲存空間使用：分析已用與可用空間
• 裝置資訊：查看基本硬體與系統資訊
• 開機時間追蹤：監控裝置開機持續時間
• 電池小貼士：提供實用省電建議
• 相片清理：偵測與刪除重複或相似相片釋放空間

網路工具：
• 網速測試：測量網路連線速度
• Wi-Fi 資訊：查看網路名稱、IP 位址與連線狀態
• IP 查詢：查看公網 IP 的地理位置資訊

實用工具：
• 單位換算器：支援各類單位轉換
• 貨幣換算器：即時匯率與幣值轉換
• 日期時間計算器：支援工作日計算的日期差異
• 時區轉換器：全球時間轉換，支援夏令時間顯示
• 倒數計時與提醒：建立美觀倒數計時，支援提醒與重複事件
• Magic 計數器：追蹤多個計數器，提供統計與連續天數
• QR 掃描器：快速掃描二維碼
• 文件掃描器：高品質掃描與儲存文件
• 指南針與水平儀：使用裝置感應器測量方向與水平
• 螢幕方向鎖定：於應用內鎖定螢幕方向
• 音量測量儀：透過麥克風測量環境音量
• 剪貼簿管理器：管理當前應用中的複製內容
• 手電筒：開啟裝置手電筒照明
• 螢幕亮度調整：可於應用內直接調整亮度

特色亮點：
• 簡潔直覺的導引式介面
• 無廣告、無內購
• 輕巧省電
• 支援所有 iOS 裝置
• 持續新增工具與更新
• 重視隱私與效能

適用族群：
• 裝置監控與效能優化
• 日常測量與轉換任務
• 掃描文件與 QR 碼
• 相片清理與空間管理
• 倒數提醒與計劃管理
• 追蹤習慣與統計進度
• 快速使用工具如手電筒與亮度調整
• 執行簡易網路測試診斷

立即下載 MagicKit AI，使用一款智慧又強大的工具箱，簡化您的日常工作與生活！

hk.releaseNotes: Thank you for playing Evoland 2! We're keeping the game up to date and fixing issues.
hk.description:
What were your childhood games like?

Onboard on an epic adventure of more than 20 hours through video games history filled with a ton of funny classical games references.

From 2D RPG, through 3D vs fight to a shooter, a trading card game and more you’ll get your fill of jumping from a game genre to another, never bored.

“Evoland 2: A slight case of spacetime continuum disorder” is not only one game but many, backboned with a story that will make you travel through time, discovering different art styles and video gaming technology.

Released first on PC with 500.000 copies shipped, we’re proud to share with you this experience carefully adapted for mobile devices.  

« It’s a mashup on a grand scale — and a successful one — bringing together many of the elements that make us love all those games individually. » - 9/10 GamesBeat

“Evoland 2 manages to seamlessly blend an incredible number of genres into a single, wonderful experience.”
4/5 – Hardcoregamer

Compatible with MFI controllers. 

If you experience any problem with Evoland 2, please contact our customer support at hello@playdigious.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

advisories: 偶爾/輕度的模擬賭博內容
偶爾/輕度使用或提及酒精、煙草或藥物
偶爾/輕度的粗俗用語或低俗幽默
頻繁/極度的成人或性暗示題材
偶爾/輕度的暴力卡通或幻想
偶爾/輕度的性愛或裸露內容
hk.description:
《身為警察》（This Is the Police）是一個策略/冒險遊戲，故事背景設定在一個螺旋式圍繞排水系統的城市。在遊戲中你將擔任堅韌不拔的警察局長傑克·博伊德的角色，你將潛入一個關於犯罪和陰謀的深刻故事。傑克會不會拿到一大筆錢安心地退休，亦或是最終會破產...還是更糟？

 - 你的任務很明確：在傑克·博伊德退休之前的180天內賺到50萬美元。怎麼賺？一切由你決定！

 - 決定，決定！《身為警察》（This Is the Police）的故事核心是一個黑暗的故事，以及你該如何破解它。無論你決定什麼，你的選擇都會影響比賽 - 以及傑克博伊德的命運。

- 《黃昏三鏢客》？弗里堡警察局局長能夠應付各種人。遊戲全看你的本事，找到壞人並決定如何處理他們。

 - 履行你的職責。作為弗里堡警察局的負責人，傑克每天都要處理各種各樣的挑戰：應對緊急情況，管理他的警員，保衛部門對抗市政廳和腐敗的市長等等。

 - 執行調查並收集針對弗里堡犯罪團伙的證據。

 - 處理城市中的競爭力量。每個人都可向你提供服務，但每一個都是有代價的。

 - 豐富而完整的配音故事：由《毀滅公爵》的配音演員Jon St. John為傑克·博伊德配音。

advisories: 偶爾/輕度的暴力卡通或幻想
偶爾/輕度的恐怖或驚嚇題材
頻繁/極度的現實生活暴力
hk.releaseNotes:
- Now you can turn on Firts Person Mode (eye icon near healthbar)
- You can turn on classic camera settings as in game launch version (checkbox in the main menu)
hk.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

hk.trackCensoredName: 吃貨人生 飲食紀錄App
hk.trackName: 吃貨人生 飲食紀錄App
hk.description:
這是一個飲食紀錄App，使用這個App你將能夠在無壓力的情況下選擇最適合你的飲食，App中保證沒有卡洛里也沒有體重相關的數字壓力，除此之外還擁有：

- 最簡單可愛明瞭的首頁
- 攝影濾鏡讓你能夠分享你的食物美照
- 隨時能夠視覺化你的均衡狀況
- 擁有一個會跟你講不少話的好朋友
- 學會如何用最流行的靜觀飲食感受你的食物！

愛我就別讓我難過！快下載我吧！

• 網速測試：測量網路連線速度
• Wi-Fi 資訊：查看網路名稱、IP 位址與連線狀態
• IP 查詢：查看公網 IP 的地理位置資訊

實用工具：
• 單位換算器：支援各類單位轉換
• 貨幣換算器：即時匯率與幣值轉換
• 日期時間計算器：支援工作日計算的日期差異
• 時區轉換器：全球時間轉換，支援夏令時間顯示
• 倒數計時與提醒：建立美觀倒數計時，支援提醒與重複事件
• Magic 計數器：追蹤多個計數器，提供統計與連續天數
• QR 掃描器：快速掃描二維碼
• 文件掃描器：高品質掃描與儲存文件
• 指南針與水平儀：使用裝置感應器測量方向與水平
• 螢幕方向鎖定：於應用內鎖定螢幕方向
• 音量測量儀：透過麥克風測量環境音量
• 剪貼簿管理器：管理當前應用中的複製內容
• 手電筒：開啟裝置手電筒照明
• 螢幕亮度調整：可於應用內直接調整亮度

特色亮點：
• 簡潔直覺的導引式介面
• 無廣告、無內購
• 輕巧省電
• 支援所有 iOS 裝置
• 持續新增工具與更新
• 重視隱私與效能

適用族群：
• 裝置監控與效能優化
• 日常測量與轉換任務
• 掃描文件與 QR 碼
• 相片清理與空間管理
• 倒數提醒與計劃管理
• 追蹤習慣與統計進度
• 快速使用工具如手電筒與亮度調整
• 執行簡易網路測試診斷

立即下載 MagicKit AI，使用一款智慧又強大的工具箱，簡化您的日常工作與生活！

tw.releaseNotes: Thank you for playing Evoland 2! We're keeping the game up to date and fixing issues.
tw.description:
What were your childhood games like?

Onboard on an epic adventure of more than 20 hours through video games history filled with a ton of funny classical games references.

From 2D RPG, through 3D vs fight to a shooter, a trading card game and more you’ll get your fill of jumping from a game genre to another, never bored.

“Evoland 2: A slight case of spacetime continuum disorder” is not only one game but many, backboned with a story that will make you travel through time, discovering different art styles and video gaming technology.

Released first on PC with 500.000 copies shipped, we’re proud to share with you this experience carefully adapted for mobile devices.  

« It’s a mashup on a grand scale — and a successful one — bringing together many of the elements that make us love all those games individually. » - 9/10 GamesBeat

“Evoland 2 manages to seamlessly blend an incredible number of genres into a single, wonderful experience.”
4/5 – Hardcoregamer

Compatible with MFI controllers. 

If you experience any problem with Evoland 2, please contact our customer support at hello@playdigious.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

advisories: 偶而/輕微的模擬賭博
偶而/輕微的酒精、菸草或藥物使用或相關內容
偶而/輕微的粗話或低俗幽默
頻繁/強烈的成人/性暗示題材
偶而/輕微的卡通或幻想暴力
偶而/輕微的色情內容與裸露
tw.description:
《身為警察》（This Is the Police）是一個策略/冒險遊戲，故事背景設定在一個螺旋式圍繞排水系統的城市。在遊戲中你將擔任堅韌不拔的警察局長傑克·博伊德的角色，你將潛入一個關於犯罪和陰謀的深刻故事。傑克會不會拿到一大筆錢安心地退休，亦或是最終會破產...還是更糟？

 - 你的任務很明確：在傑克·博伊德退休之前的180天內賺到50萬美元。怎麼賺？一切由你決定！

 - 決定，決定！《身為警察》（This Is the Police）的故事核心是一個黑暗的故事，以及你該如何破解它。無論你決定什麼，你的選擇都會影響比賽 - 以及傑克博伊德的命運。

- 《黃昏三鏢客》？弗里堡警察局局長能夠應付各種人。遊戲全看你的本事，找到壞人並決定如何處理他們。

 - 履行你的職責。作為弗里堡警察局的負責人，傑克每天都要處理各種各樣的挑戰：應對緊急情況，管理他的警員，保衛部門對抗市政廳和腐敗的市長等等。

 - 執行調查並收集針對弗里堡犯罪團伙的證據。

 - 處理城市中的競爭力量。每個人都可向你提供服務，但每一個都是有代價的。

 - 豐富而完整的配音故事：由《毀滅公爵》的配音演員Jon St. John為傑克·博伊德配音。

advisories: 偶而/輕微的卡通或幻想暴力
偶而/輕微的驚悚/恐怖題材
頻繁/強烈的現實暴力
tw.releaseNotes:
- Now you can turn on Firts Person Mode (eye icon near healthbar)
- You can turn on classic camera settings as in game launch version (checkbox in the main menu)
tw.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

advisories: 偶而/輕微的酒精、菸草或藥物使用或相關內容
tw.releaseNotes: • 已支援最新 iOS 系统，确保流畅体验
tw.description:
在一場災難性的海難後，你成為唯一的倖存者，被海浪拋上一座與世隔絕的熱帶島嶼。 
在這裡，生存是唯一目標：搭建簡陋庇護所、製造求生工具、尋找安全的淡水和食物……然而，真正的考驗才剛剛開始。 
﻿ 
■ 簡單操作 
• 點擊即可移動和收集資源。 
﻿ 
■ 生存挑戰 
• 僅靠野果無法完全填飽肚子。 
• 透過小遊戲捕魚，製作陷阱捕捉獵物，獲取珍貴的肉類資源。 
﻿ 
■ 健康模擬系統 
• 維持健康並不容易。 
• 健康系統包含：體重、傷口、飢餓、口渴、精力、體溫，乃至蚊蟲叮咬… 
﻿ 
■ 建造與升級 
• 收集材料製作傢俱，解鎖新工具和料理。 
﻿ 
■ 多變的天氣系統 
• 不同的天氣會限制你的行動，可能打亂你一整天的計畫。 
﻿ 
■ 自給自足的田園生活 
• 掌握種植作物與飼養山羊的訣竅，自己製作麵包。 
﻿ 
■ 放鬆氛圍 
• 自然白噪音。 
﻿ 
--------- 
離線即玩・全程無廣告

tw.trackName: 吃貨人生 飲食紀錄App
tw.description:
這是一個飲食紀錄App，使用這個App你將能夠在無壓力的情況下選擇最適合你的飲食，App中保證沒有卡洛里也沒有體重相關的數字壓力，除此之外還擁有：

- 最簡單可愛明瞭的首頁
- 攝影濾鏡讓你能夠分享你的食物美照
- 隨時能夠視覺化你的均衡狀況
- 擁有一個會跟你講不少話的好朋友
- 學會如何用最流行的靜觀飲食感受你的食物！

愛我就別讓我難過！快下載我吧！
tw.trackCensoredName: 吃貨人生 飲食紀錄App

us.description:
Dive into a deep story of corruption, crime and intrigue. Take the role of gritty Police Chief Jack Boyd, and come face to face with the ugly underbelly of Freeburg, a city spiraling the drain. Will Jack reach his retirement with a nice stack of bills, or will he end up broken ... or worse? 

Manage your staff, respond to emergencies, and investigate crimes in a city on the brink of chaos. The mafia underworld maneuvers behind the scenes, sinking their claws ever deeper into the city, even as the mayor is ready to exploit every situation to his political advantage. 

Choose your approach to each situation as it unfolds. Sometimes you’ll be responding to a developing crisis at a crime scene, or negotiating with Freeburg’s crime bosses. Sometimes you’ll find yourself dodging questions in the press room, or even the occasional cross-examination in the witness box. Can you keep this pressure cooker from exploding, at least for long enough to stash away a nice retirement nest egg?

- Your mission is clear: make $500,000 in 180 days before Jack Boyd reaches retirement. How? That’s up to you!

- Decisions, decisions! This Is the Police is all about a dark story and how you react to it. Whatever you decide, your choices will influence the game – and the fate of Jack Boyd.

- The Good, the Bad, and... the Ugly? The Chief of Freeburg's Police Department deals with all kind of people. It is up to you to find the bad guys and decide how to deal with them.

- Carry out your duties. As head of Freeburg PD, Jack deals with all sorts of challenges every day: responding to emergencies, managing his officers, defending the department against City Hall and a corrupt mayor, and much more.

- Solve Investigations and gather evidence against the criminal gangs of Freeburg.

- Deal with the competing powers of the city. Everyone offers you favors, and each one comes at a price.
Rich and fully voiced story: Jack Boyd is portrayed by Jon St. John, the voice of Duke Nukem.

advisories: Frequent/Intense Cartoon or Fantasy Violence
us.description:
Discover and conquer countless worlds across deep space. Unravel a story full of challenges and threats that will lead you across the galaxy on an extraordinary voyage. 

Nothing lasts long in deep space, and peace is not an exception!
Welcome to Iron Marines: Invasion!

Enjoy unique stage missions and special operations in exciting new worlds, each one with its own particular terrain, style, enemies, and conditions. Learn how to beat them one by one!

Command the Federation’s troops across the galaxy, with the aid of Heroes & Units that will allow you to boost your RTS game skills to the limit.

Battle extraordinary enemies and ferocious alien creatures in fun and electrifying missions. Plan your strategy to defend the peace in the galaxy!

For all Iron Marines & SciFi action fans who get the kicks of offline RTS games and strategy games. Become the tactical specialist you’re meant to be by leading your own army in thrilling, mind-blowing missions.

The invasion is at our gates!
Lead the fiercest combat corps across the galaxy. Fight side by side with the Federation’s toughest Marines!

Now you can combine your squad and take advantage of each Unit’s unique fighting skills: from rangers to snipers, mechas, missile launchers, or fearsome alien warrior clans.

Train jaw-dropping heroes and their useful abilities: from boosting up your army’s morale and firepower to increase their stamina and reach, or detecting upcoming enemies before they attack you. Help them join the fight to keep peace among the worlds!

Become an expert on the galaxy’s biggest mysteries!

Use an in-game Encyclopedia to understand the worlds you explore or identify the enemies you face. Take advantage of the tactical info available to configure your strategic game plan.

Check all the amazing features of this real-time strategy space odyssey:
- An entire galaxy to be discovered.
- 25+ campaign missions that will take you to the most incredible worlds. Tons of planets for you to explore and defend by planning a tight strategic game plan!
- 75+ special operations for you to upgrade your Marine abilities to the peak level.
- 10 Unit groups for a total of 24 different troops. You can even combine your backup depending on the mission and strategy you’re planning to deploy.
- 9 powerful heroes with strong skills for you to train. Help them become the Galaxy’s finest!
- 8 Special Weapons to boost your army tactics to the stars! Set your game plan and take advantage of instant weapons like bouncers, toxic bombs, or even drone factories.
- 40 Upgrades to improve your strategy and empower your units with defense drones, napalm rockets, ricocheting blasts and much more.
- 20+ Achievements to show how much of a real-time strategy expert you’ve become!

Choose your difficulty mode for the best rts games experience: Casual, Normal, or Veteran. And if you think you’ve seen it all across the galaxy… the impossible mode - only for the elite players, available offline!

Prove yourself in daily challenges and collect amazing rewards.

Play rts games offline: Enjoy the awesome real-time strategy experience anywhere, as you explore incredible worlds.

Iron Marines Invasion will give you hours of colorful, fun gameplay in this epic real-time strategy space odyssey, available to play RTS offline game.

us.releaseNotes:
- Performance improvements and minor enhancements
- Bug fixes for a smoother experience
us.description:
MagicKit AI is a complete utility app designed to help you monitor your device, optimize performance, and access everyday tools from one convenient interface. Built specifically for iOS, MagicKit AI brings together essential features while maintaining your privacy and battery life.

Device and System Tools
• Battery Status: View current charge level and charging state
• Storage Usage: Analyze available and used storage
• Device Info: Check basic hardware and system details
• Uptime Tracker: Monitor how long your device has been running
• Battery Tips: Get practical advice to improve battery usage
• Photo Cleaner: Detect and remove duplicate or similar photos to free up space
• Contact Cleaner: Organize contacts by finding duplicates and incomplete entries
• RAM Manager: Monitor memory usage and optimize performance
• Device Benchmark: Test CPU, GPU, memory, and network performance

Network Tools
• Speed Test: Measure internet connection speed
• Wi-Fi Info: See network name, IP address, and connection status
• IP Lookup: Check geolocation of public IP addresses
• Location Info: Track GPS location, speed, direction, and altitude

Security & Privacy Tools
• Password Generator: Create strong, secure passwords with customizable options
• Passphrase Generator: Generate memorable and secure passphrases
• UUID Generator: Create unique identifiers in various formats
• Secure PIN Generator: Generate secure PIN codes with multiple options
• Temporary Email: Create disposable email addresses for privacy protection

Utility Tools
• Unit Converter: Convert between different measurements
• Currency & Crypto Converter: Get live exchange rates for fiat and cryptocurrencies
• Date Time Calculator: Calculate differences between dates with business days support
• Time Zone Converter: Convert time across various time zones with live updates and DST status
• Countdown & Reminders: Create beautiful countdowns with customizable reminders and recurring events
• Magic Counter: Track multiple counters with detailed statistics and streaks
• QR Scanner: Scan QR codes instantly
• Document & Card Scanner: Capture and save high-quality document scans with AI-powered text recognition
• Compass and Level: Measure direction and level using device sensors
• Orientation Lock: Lock screen orientation while using the app
• Audio Meter: Measure surrounding sound levels using the microphone
• Clipboard Manager: Access and manage copied text within the app session
• Flashlight & Brightness: Turn on the device flashlight and adjust screen brightness
• Note Taker: Create, organize, and manage notes with categories and iCloud backup
• Universal Generator: Generate random data including text, numbers, dates, and more
• Color Palettes Studio: Create, extract, and manage beautiful color palettes from images or manually using color pickers — perfect for designers and creatives

Highlights
• Clean and user-friendly interface with new wizard-based tools
• Featured Tools section showcasing the most popular utilities
• No ads or in-app purchases
• Lightweight and battery-efficient
• Compatible with all iOS devices
• Frequent updates with new tools
• Built with privacy and performance in mind
• Dark/Light theme support with smooth animations

Perfect for
• Device monitoring and optimization
• Everyday measurement and conversion tasks
• Scanning documents and QR codes
• Cleaning up photo storage and contacts
• Creating and managing countdowns with reminders
• Tracking habits and progress with multiple counters
• Accessing quick tools like flashlight and brightness control
• Performing simple network diagnostics
• Generating secure passwords and managing privacy
• Taking quick notes and organizing information
• Designing and managing color palettes for creative projects

Download MagicKit AI today and simplify your daily tasks with one smart, powerful toolkit.

You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.

You will be able to explore your eating habits visually and improve your eating habits. No calories and no numbers are shown in the app! 

Features:
+ Beautifully minimalist food diary app
+ In-App Camera And Filter
+ No calories No Pressure
+ Visualizes all your diets and shows your diet balance clearly!
+ Crazy and Interactive Foody Face
+ Learn how to eat mindfully and correctly right now!

Don’t make Foody Face angry! Tap download right now!

----------

The inspiration behind FoodyLife is that nowadays people pay little attention to what they eat and often eat unhealthy food. Although there are many similar apps on the market (e.g. Fitness App, Calorie counter...), most of them focus mainly on “numbers”, such as how many calories the user has eaten and how long the user should exercise to get rid of those calories, or sending the user notifications when they should get up to exercise or if they have eaten too much.

FoodyLife’ is an app that helps users track their daily diet by allowing them to keep their own food diary. The app shows neither calories nor numbers; instead, users have only to take a picture, enter their diet information, then they are able their overall diet balance. It is very simple and highly effective. Users can explore their eating habits visually, improving self-consciousness about eating habits.

advisories: Infrequent/Mild Alcohol, Tobacco, or Drug Use or References
us.description:
You are shipwrecked on a desert island. 
﻿ 
■ Survival 
• Eating only wild fruits will not fill your stomach. 
• Catch fish in a mini-game, or craft traps for meat. 
﻿ 
■ Realistic Health System 
• Staying healthy is a constant struggle. 
• Manage a complex system of needs: weight, wounds, hunger, thirst, energy, body temperature, insect bites… 
﻿ 
■ Upgrade Your Camp 
• Gather resources to craft tools and build furniture. 
﻿ 
■ Dynamic Weather 
• Changing weather limits your movements and can disrupt daily plans. 
﻿ 
■ Self-Sufficient Living 
• Learn to grow crops, raise goats, and bake bread from scratch. 
﻿ 
■ Relaxation 
• Immerse yourself in natural white noise. 
 
--------- 
Play Offline · No Ads

With this application, you can make automatic calls to the numbers you want efficiently and in a personalized way. You can define the number of repetitions, the interval between calls, add an extension, activate vibration before dialing, and even schedule your calls using a built-in calendar. Auto Redial App also offers a simple and intuitive interface, detailed call history, and multiple customization options to fit your needs.

This application is ideal for anyone who needs to make repetitive calls automatically — such as an appointment call, a busy call retry, or contacting services where the line is busy.

Main Features:
- Automatically redial busy or unanswered calls.
- Set number of retries and time intervals.
- Schedule calls in advance via calendar.
- Add extensions automatically after dialing.
- Enable vibration before each redial.
- Call history and retry stats.

Perfect for:
- Booking appointments (doctors, embassies, etc.)
- Customer service or tech support
- Calling public offices
- Freelancers and business owners following up clients

Whether you’re calling to book a doctor’s appointment, reach customer service, or just trying to connect when the line is busy, this app saves time and frustration.

tr.description:
MagicKit AI is a complete utility app designed to help you monitor your device, optimize performance, and access everyday tools from one convenient interface. Built specifically for iOS, MagicKit AI brings together essential features while maintaining your privacy and battery life.

Device and System Tools
• Battery Status: View current charge level and charging state
• Storage Usage: Analyze available and used storage
• Device Info: Check basic hardware and system details
• Uptime Tracker: Monitor how long your device has been running
• Battery Tips: Get practical advice to improve battery usage
• Photo Cleaner: Detect and remove duplicate or similar photos to free up space
• Contact Cleaner: Organize contacts by finding duplicates and incomplete entries
• RAM Manager: Monitor memory usage and optimize performance
• Device Benchmark: Test CPU, GPU, memory, and network performance

Network Tools
• Speed Test: Measure internet connection speed
• Wi-Fi Info: See network name, IP address, and connection status
• IP Lookup: Check geolocation of public IP addresses
• Location Info: Track GPS location, speed, direction, and altitude

Security & Privacy Tools
• Password Generator: Create strong, secure passwords with customizable options
• Passphrase Generator: Generate memorable and secure passphrases
• UUID Generator: Create unique identifiers in various formats
• Secure PIN Generator: Generate secure PIN codes with multiple options
• Temporary Email: Create disposable email addresses for privacy protection

Utility Tools
• Unit Converter: Convert between different measurements
• Currency & Crypto Converter: Get live exchange rates for fiat and cryptocurrencies
• Date Time Calculator: Calculate differences between dates with business days support
• Time Zone Converter: Convert time across various time zones with live updates and DST status
• Countdown & Reminders: Create beautiful countdowns with customizable reminders and recurring events
• Magic Counter: Track multiple counters with detailed statistics and streaks
• QR Scanner: Scan QR codes instantly
• Document & Card Scanner: Capture and save high-quality document scans with AI-powered text recognition
• Compass and Level: Measure direction and level using device sensors
• Orientation Lock: Lock screen orientation while using the app
• Audio Meter: Measure surrounding sound levels using the microphone
• Clipboard Manager: Access and manage copied text within the app session
• Flashlight & Brightness: Turn on the device flashlight and adjust screen brightness
• Note Taker: Create, organize, and manage notes with categories and iCloud backup
• Universal Generator: Generate random data including text, numbers, dates, and more
• Color Palettes Studio: Create, extract, and manage beautiful color palettes from images or manually using color pickers — perfect for designers and creatives

Highlights
• Clean and user-friendly interface with new wizard-based tools
• Featured Tools section showcasing the most popular utilities
• No ads or in-app purchases
• Lightweight and battery-efficient
• Compatible with all iOS devices
• Frequent updates with new tools
• Built with privacy and performance in mind
• Dark/Light theme support with smooth animations

Perfect for
• Device monitoring and optimization
• Everyday measurement and conversion tasks
• Scanning documents and QR codes
• Cleaning up photo storage and contacts
• Creating and managing countdowns with reminders
• Tracking habits and progress with multiple counters
• Accessing quick tools like flashlight and brightness control
• Performing simple network diagnostics
• Generating secure passwords and managing privacy
• Taking quick notes and organizing information
• Designing and managing color palettes for creative projects

Download MagicKit AI today and simplify your daily tasks with one smart, powerful toolkit.

tr.releaseNotes:
- Now you can turn on Firts Person Mode (eye icon near healthbar)
- You can turn on classic camera settings as in game launch version (checkbox in the main menu)
tr.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

advisories: Infrequent/Mild Alcohol, Tobacco, or Drug Use or References
tr.description:
You are shipwrecked on a desert island. 
﻿ 
■ Survival 
• Eating only wild fruits will not fill your stomach. 
• Catch fish in a mini-game, or craft traps for meat. 
﻿ 
■ Realistic Health System 
• Staying healthy is a constant struggle. 
• Manage a complex system of needs: weight, wounds, hunger, thirst, energy, body temperature, insect bites… 
﻿ 
■ Upgrade Your Camp 
• Gather resources to craft tools and build furniture. 
﻿ 
■ Dynamic Weather 
• Changing weather limits your movements and can disrupt daily plans. 
﻿ 
■ Self-Sufficient Living 
• Learn to grow crops, raise goats, and bake bread from scratch. 
﻿ 
■ Relaxation 
• Immerse yourself in natural white noise. 
 
--------- 
Play Offline · No Ads

You will be able to explore your eating habits visually and improve your eating habits. No calories and no numbers are shown in the app! 

Features:
+ Beautifully minimalist food diary app
+ In-App Camera And Filter
+ No calories No Pressure
+ Visualizes all your diets and shows your diet balance clearly!
+ Crazy and Interactive Foody Face
+ Learn how to eat mindfully and correctly right now!

Don’t make Foody Face angry! Tap download right now!

----------

The inspiration behind FoodyLife is that nowadays people pay little attention to what they eat and often eat unhealthy food. Although there are many similar apps on the market (e.g. Fitness App, Calorie counter...), most of them focus mainly on “numbers”, such as how many calories the user has eaten and how long the user should exercise to get rid of those calories, or sending the user notifications when they should get up to exercise or if they have eaten too much.

FoodyLife’ is an app that helps users track their daily diet by allowing them to keep their own food diary. The app shows neither calories nor numbers; instead, users have only to take a picture, enter their diet information, then they are able their overall diet balance. It is very simple and highly effective. Users can explore their eating habits visually, improving self-consciousness about eating habits.

pt.releaseNotes: Thank you for playing Evoland 2! We're keeping the game up to date and fixing issues.
pt.description:
What were your childhood games like?

Onboard on an epic adventure of more than 20 hours through video games history filled with a ton of funny classical games references.

From 2D RPG, through 3D vs fight to a shooter, a trading card game and more you’ll get your fill of jumping from a game genre to another, never bored.

“Evoland 2: A slight case of spacetime continuum disorder” is not only one game but many, backboned with a story that will make you travel through time, discovering different art styles and video gaming technology.

Released first on PC with 500.000 copies shipped, we’re proud to share with you this experience carefully adapted for mobile devices.  

« It’s a mashup on a grand scale — and a successful one — bringing together many of the elements that make us love all those games individually. » - 9/10 GamesBeat

“Evoland 2 manages to seamlessly blend an incredible number of genres into a single, wonderful experience.”
4/5 – Hardcoregamer

Compatible with MFI controllers. 

If you experience any problem with Evoland 2, please contact our customer support at hello@playdigious.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

pt.description:
"Mergulhe numa história intensa de corrupção, crimes e intrigas. Encarne o rígido Chefe de Polícia Jack Boyd e fique cara a cara com a escória de Freeburg, uma cidade em queda livre. Será que Jack vai chegar à aposentadoria com uma bolada, esperando para ser gasta, ou vai acabar durango… ou pior ainda?

Seja tragado por este polêmico conto de corrupção, crime e intriga policial. Gerencie sua equipe, atende às emergências e investigue os crimes numa cidade à beira do caos. O submundo da máfia trama por trás dos panos, fincando suas garras cada vez mais fundo na cidade, mesmo o prefeito estando pronto para explorar cada situação para levar vantagem política.

Escolha sua abordagem a cada situação à medida que ela se desenrola. Você às vezes vai reagir a uma crise se desdobrando numa cena de crime, ou negociar com os chefões do crime de Freeburg. Outras vezes, você vai se deparar se esquivando de perguntas feitas numa coletiva de imprensa, ou até mesmo num eventual interrogatório no rol de testemunhas. Será que você consegue evitar que este vulcão entre em erupção, pelo menos até conseguir um bom pé de meia para a aposentadoria? Ou será que você vai acabar atrás das grades — ou pior?"

- Sua missão é simples: Conseguir $ 500.000 em 180 dias, antes de Jack Boyd se aposentar. Como? Aí é com você!

- Decisões, decisões e mais decisões: em miúdos, “This Is the Police” é uma história sombria e como você reage a ela. Qualquer que seja a sua decisão, ela influenciará o jogo — e, portanto, o destino de Jack Boyd.

- O bem, o mal… a escória? O Chefe do Departamento de Polícia de Freeburg lida com todos os tipos de pessoas. Vai de você separar os bons dos maus.

- Cumpra com suas obrigações: Como chefe do DP de Freeburg, Jack deve cuidar das atividades cotidianas: atender às emergências, gerenciar seus policiais, brigar pelo orçamento…

- Comece resolvendo as Investigações e consiga evidências contra as gangues criminosas de Freeburg.

- Negocie com os diferentes poderes da cidade: o prefeito, a máfia, a igreja, o sindicato dos trabalhadores. Todos oferecem favores, mas tudo tem seu preço.

- Dublagem feita totalmente pelo glorioso Jon St. John (vulgo: a voz do Duke Nukem).

pt.releaseNotes:
- Performance improvements and minor enhancements
- Bug fixes for a smoother experience
pt.description:
MagicKit AI – Kit de Ferramentas Tudo-em-Um para o Seu Dispositivo

O MagicKit AI é um aplicativo utilitário completo, projetado para ajudá-lo a monitorar seu dispositivo, otimizar o desempenho e acessar ferramentas do dia a dia em uma interface prática. Desenvolvido especialmente para iOS, o MagicKit AI reúne funcionalidades essenciais enquanto protege sua privacidade e economiza bateria.

Ferramentas do Dispositivo e do Sistema
	•	Status da Bateria: Veja o nível de carga e o estado atual da bateria
	•	Uso de Armazenamento: Analise o espaço usado e disponível
	•	Informações do Dispositivo: Verifique detalhes do hardware e do sistema
	•	Tempo de Atividade: Monitore há quanto tempo o dispositivo está ligado
	•	Dicas de Bateria: Receba conselhos úteis para melhorar o uso da bateria
	•	Limpeza de Fotos: Detecte e remova fotos duplicadas ou semelhantes
	•	Limpeza de Contatos: Organize contatos removendo duplicatas e entradas incompletas
	•	Gerenciador de RAM: Monitore o uso da memória e otimize o desempenho
	•	Teste de Benchmark: Avalie o desempenho de CPU, GPU, memória e rede

Ferramentas de Rede
	•	Teste de Velocidade: Meça a velocidade da conexão com a internet
	•	Informações do Wi-Fi: Veja nome da rede, IP e status da conexão
	•	Consulta de IP: Verifique a geolocalização de endereços IP públicos
	•	Informações de Localização: Acompanhe GPS, velocidade, direção e altitude

Segurança e Privacidade
	•	Gerador de Senhas: Crie senhas fortes e seguras com opções personalizáveis
	•	Gerador de Frases de Acesso: Crie frases memoráveis e seguras
	•	Gerador de UUID: Crie identificadores únicos em vários formatos
	•	Gerador de PIN Seguro: Gere códigos PIN seguros com várias opções
	•	E-mail Temporário: Crie e-mails descartáveis para proteger sua privacidade

Ferramentas Utilitárias
	•	Conversor de Unidades: Converta entre diferentes unidades de medida
	•	Conversor de Moeda e Cripto: Veja taxas de câmbio em tempo real para moedas e criptomoedas
	•	Calculadora de Datas: Calcule diferenças entre datas com suporte para dias úteis
	•	Conversor de Fuso Horário: Converta horários com atualizações ao vivo e suporte a horário de verão
	•	Contagem Regressiva e Lembretes: Crie contagens regressivas personalizadas com lembretes e eventos recorrentes
	•	Contador Mágico: Acompanhe múltiplos contadores com estatísticas e sequências
	•	Leitor de QR Code: Escaneie códigos QR instantaneamente
	•	Scanner de Documentos e Cartões: Capture e salve digitalizações com reconhecimento de texto via IA
	•	Bússola e Nível: Meça direção e nível usando os sensores do dispositivo
	•	Travar Orientação: Trave a orientação da tela ao usar o app
	•	Medidor de Áudio: Meça níveis de som ao redor com o microfone
	•	Gerenciador de Área de Transferência: Acesse e gerencie textos copiados durante a sessão
	•	Lanterna e Brilho: Ative a lanterna e ajuste o brilho da tela
	•	Bloco de Notas: Crie, organize e gerencie notas com categorias e backup no iCloud
	•	Gerador Universal: Gere dados aleatórios como texto, números, datas e mais

Destaques
	•	Interface limpa e fácil de usar com ferramentas assistidas
	•	Seção de Ferramentas em Destaque com as mais populares
	•	Sem anúncios ou compras no aplicativo
	•	Leve e eficiente no uso de bateria
	•	Compatível com todos os dispositivos iOS
	•	Atualizações frequentes com novas ferramentas
	•	Desenvolvido com foco em privacidade e desempenho
	•	Suporte para tema claro/escuro com animações suaves

Perfeito para:
	•	Monitorar e otimizar o dispositivo
	•	Medições e conversões do dia a dia
	•	Escanear documentos e QR Codes
	•	Limpar fotos e contatos duplicados
	•	Criar lembretes e contagens regressivas
	•	Acompanhar hábitos e progresso
	•	Acessar ferramentas rápidas como lanterna e brilho
	•	Diagnósticos básicos de rede
	•	Criar senhas seguras e manter a privacidade
	•	Tomar notas rápidas e organizadas

Baixe o MagicKit AI hoje mesmo e simplifique suas tarefas diárias com um kit inteligente e poderoso.
